IG_DEPENDENCY_CLASH_CANONICAL

input/openehr-ig.xmlThe packageId hl7.fhir.uv.tools points to the canonical http://hl7.org/fhir/tools which is inconsistent with the stated canonical of http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/hl7.fhir.uv.tools/ImplementationGuide/hl7.fhir.uv.tools

IG_DEPENDENCY_INVALID_URL

input/openehr-ig.xmlThe canonical URL http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/hl7.fhir.uv.tools/ImplementationGuide/hl7.fhir.uv.tools doesn't point to an actual ImplementationGuide resource

input/resources/PROPORTION-KIND.jsonThe kind logical must be the same as the kind primitive-type in the base structure http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/code (base type = code)
